verse_text: 'This is the dream, and we will tell its interpretation before the king.

links.context: [[DAN.2:31]]-44 indicates this mysterious metal foundation not only provides stability but has the ability to forcibly crush all opposition as well. These images are contrasted with the feet of clay found in [[DAN.2:33]], [[DAN.2:43]]: the kingdoms of this world are not permanent, nor ultimately triumphant.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
